zh.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Aslakby於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾易亞斯比。她於大約1230年與Stephen de Meinill在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾艾斯可奧 格朗享年131歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Aslakby was born about 1150, in Easby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Stephen de Meinill about 1230, in Whorlton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1280, in Aiskew Grange, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 131.

Elle a épousé Stephen de Meinill environ 1230, à Whorlton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Aiskew Grange, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 131 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Aslakbyは約1150年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアエアスビーで生まれた。約1230年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでStephen de Meinillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアエイスケウ グランッジで131歳で死去した。

ko.Aske, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 아이스케w 그랑
ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Aslakby(은)는 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 이스비에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Stephen de Meinill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 아이스케w 그랑에서 131세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Aske, Yorkshire, England: эискю гранг, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Aslakby родилась около 1150 г. в местности эасби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen de Meinill около 1230 г. в местности уаурлтон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности эискю гранг, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 131 год.
